RecipeDef.label: War Scorpion
RecipeDef.description:
Designated "War Scorpion", this unit was engineered for breaching high-density fortifications. Its chassis comprises millions of self-repairing uranium-alloy scales that dynamically reconfigure into localized defense barriers during damage events - providing extraordinary physical resistance. Combat logs confirm operational continuity after direct high-explosive impacts.
The tail-mounted "Solaris Penetrator" rail cannon represents its signature armament: High-compression thermal projectiles released after brief charging can vaporize most fortifications and vehicles. Each discharge triggers thermal surges and terrain deformation - an iconic area-denial attack.
Bilateral suppression artillery maintains continuous fire against infantry and light vehicles during main cannon operation cycles.
When entering Crimson Tide mode, it launches successive thermobaric grenades combining concussive blasts with persistent combustion effects, clearing residual resistance from enemy cover and advance paths.
